text.tspan: Prefill: all prompt tokens, in parallel
Why TTFT is fast and where compute matters.
Your prompt: "Explain unified memory in one sentence."
All N tokens flow through every transformer layer in lockstep.
Tensor cores chew through N x dim matmuls per layer. Fully GPU-saturated.
KV cache for ALL N tokens gets built up here, reused during decode.
Why this is fast on Spark:
5th-gen tensor cores deliver up to 1 PFLOP FP4 (NVIDIA published peak).
A 1K-token prompt prefills in tens of milliseconds. That's your TTFT.
Ollama published numbers: Llama 3.1 8B Q4 ~7,614 prefill tok/s. gpt-oss 20B MXFP4 ~3,224 prefill tok/s.
